toast.markAllReadFailed: Kwemeza ko amatangazo yose yasomwe byanze
toast.accessDenied: Ntabwo ufite uburenganzira bwo kugera kuri iki gice.

hero.subtitle: IMARA ni urubuga rukomeye rw'ubuhinzi rukoresha ubwenge bw'ikoranabuhanga mu Rwanda, rufasha abahinzi kongera umusaruro, kumenya indwara hakiri kare, no guhuza n'amasoko - byose biva kuri telefone yawe.

features.title: Ibyo Ukeneye Byose kugira Uhinge mu Buryo Bwiza

cropAdvisory.title: Inama ku Bihingwa
cropAdvisory.description: Hura n'igihingwa gikwiriye ubutaka bwawe, ikirere, n'intego z'umusaruro.

diseaseDetection.title: Kumenya Indwara
diseaseDetection.description: Menya ibibazo by'ibihingwa hakiri kare ukoresheje isuzuma rifashwa n'ifoto n'intambwe zo gufata.

weatherIntelligence.title: Amakuru ku Kirere
weatherIntelligence.description: Menya mbere impinduka z'ikirere ukoresheje itangazo ry'ubuhinzi rigenewe agace wabarizwamo.

howItWorks.title: Uko IMARA Ikora
howItWorks.subtitle: Tangira mu minota mike uhindure uburyo bwawe bwo guhinga

createProfile.title: Fungura Umwirondoro Wawe
createProfile.description: Tubwire aho umurima wawe uherereye, ingano yawo, n'ibihingwa uhinga.

getRecommendations.title: Bona Inama
getRecommendations.description: Ubwenge bw'ikoranabuhanga bwacu busesengura amakuru yawe bukaguha inama z'ubuhinzi zihariye.

growSucceed.title: Hinga Utsinde
growSucceed.description: Kurikiza inama, kurikirane iterambere ryawe, kandi wongere umusaruro wawe.

testimonials.title: Bizewe n'Abahinzi mu Rwanda Hose
testimonials.subtitle: Reba uko IMARA ihindura ubuhinzi ku bahinzi babarirwa mu bihumbi

items.content: IMARA yanyibwo gukuba kabiri umusaruro w'ibigori byanjye mu gihembwe kimwe. Inama z'ubuhinzi zari nk'ibyo nari nkeneye.
Igikoresho cyo kumenya indwara cyarokoye umusaruro wanjye wose w'inyanya. Narashoboye kumenya no kuvura indwara mbere yuko ikwirakwira.
Koperative yacu ubu ikoresha IMARA mu byemezo byose by'ubuhinzi. Amatangazo y'ibiciro by'isoko yongereye inyungu zacu na 40%.

cta.title: Witeguye Guhindura Umurima Wawe?
cta.description: Ifatanye n'abahinzi barenga {{count}} bakoresha IMARA mu guhinga neza no kongera amafaranga binjiza. Kwiyandikisha ni ubuntu.

footer.tagline: Guha abahinzi b'Abanyarwanda imbaraga ukoresheje ikoranabuhanga ry'ubuhinzi.

login.title: Ikaze Ugaruka
login.passwordError: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kugira nibura inyuguti 6

register.title: Fungura Konti
register.phoneError: Andika numero ya telefone y'u Rwanda nyayo (urugero: 0788123456)
register.passwordError: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kugira nibura inyuguti 6
register.confirmPasswordError: Iyemeza ry'ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kugira nibura inyuguti 6

accountTypeHelp.farmer: Iyandikishe nk'umuhinzi kugira ngo ucunge ibihingwa, imenyekanisha ry'indwara, iteganyagihe n'ubujyanama bw'ubuhinzi.
accountTypeHelp.agro-dealer: Iyandikishe nk'umucuruzi w'inyongeramusaruro utanga imiti, ifumbire n'ibindi bicuruzwa by'ubuhinzi.

overview.title: Imbonerahamwe
overview.subtitle: Murakaza neza {{name}}! Dore incamake y'umurima wawe.

items.message: Imvura nyinshi iteganyijwe i Kigali ejo
Indwara y'ibigori yabonetse mu Ntara y'Iburasirazuba
Igihe cyiza cyo gutera inyanya gitangira icyumweru gitaha

soil.pageSubtitle: Isuzuma ryuzuye ry'ubuzima bw'ubutaka n'inama ku bihingwa bikwiriye
soil.cropSuitabilityDescription: Bishingiye ku miterere y'ubutaka bwawe n'imiterere y'ikirere y'aho uherereye
soil.noCropSuitabilityData: Nta makuru ku bihingwa bikwiriye ahari.
soil.recommendationsDescription: Ibikorwa byo kunoza ubuzima bw'ubutaka bwawe
soil.addMoreTestsHint: Ongeraho ibizamini by'ubutaka mu gihe kugira ngo ubone impinduka n'amateka yabyo.
soil.testHistoryDescriptionWithLocation: Inyandiko z'ibizamini ku giti cyabyo kuri {{location}}
soil.deleteTestDescription: Iki gikorwa ntigishobora gusubizwa inyuma. Inyandiko y'ikizamini izasibwa burundu.
soil.formValidationError: Nyamuneka uzuza neza imyanya yose isabwa
soil.locationPlaceholder: urugero: Akarere ka Musanze, u Rwanda

crops.pageSubtitle: Inama z'ibihingwa zihariye zishingiye ku miterere y'umurima wawe
crops.conditionsBannerSubtitle: Amakuru y'igihe nyacyo yo gufata neza ibyemezo byo gutera
crops.plantingCalendarDescription: Ibihe byiza byo gutera mu mwaka wose

maize: Tera mu butaka bucukuye neza nyuma y'imvura ya mbere
Shyiraho ifumbire ya azote ibyumweru 4 nyuma yo gutera
beans: Tandukanya n'ibihingwa by'imbuto kugira ngo wongere azote mu butaka
Irinde imirima ihohotewe n'amazi kugira ngo wirinde kubora imizi
Sarura igihe ibinyampeke byahindutse umuhondo bikumye
irishPotatoes: Tera mu butaka bukonje, bucukuye neza kandi bworoshye
Zibira ubutaka ku mizi uko ibihingwa bikura
Bika ibirayi byasaruwe ahantu hijimye, hakonje kandi hafite umwuka
tomatoes: Shyiraho inkoni cyangwa ikinjana kugira ngo bifashe gukura neza
Hira buri gihe kugira ngo wirinde kubora ku gice cy'ibua
Kurikirane amababi yo hasi kugira ngo umenye hakiri kare ikibazo cy'indwara

disease.pageSubtitle: Menya indwara z'ibihingwa ako kanya ukoresheje isesengura ry'ifoto rikoresha ubwenge bw'ikoranabuhanga
disease.scanCardDescription: Ohereza cyangwa fata ifoto y'igihingwa kirwaye kugira ngo ubone isuzuma ako kanya
disease.dragDropTitle: Kurura kandi ushyire ifoto, cyangwa ukande kugira ngo ushakishe
disease.dragDropSubtitle: Bona ibisubizo byo kumenya indwara ako kanya bikoresheje ubwenge bw'ikoranabuhanga
disease.tipEarlyDetectionDescription: Suzuma ibihingwa byawe buri cyumweru kugira ngo umenye hakiri kare ibimenyetso by'indwara.
disease.tipPhotoTipsDescription: Fata amafoto asobanutse kandi afite urumuri ruhagije y'amababi yarwaye kugira ngo isuzuma riboneke neza.
disease.tipExpertHelpDescription: Vugana n'umuhanga mu buhinzi wo mu karere kawe niba ukeneye inama z'inyongera ku kuvura.
disease.databaseDescription: Reba indwara zikunze kugaragara mu bihingwa n'uburyo bwo kuzivura

maizeLeafBlight.name: Indwara y'Amababi y'Ibigori
maizeLeafBlight.treatment: Koresha umuti w'ibyonyi kandi ukure amababi yarwaye kugira ngo wirinde gukwirakwira.

beanRust.name: Igicurama cy'Ibishyimbo
beanRust.treatment: Koresha umuti w'ibyonyi ukozwe muri sulfuru kandi unoze uko umwuka unyura hagati y'ibihingwa.

tomatoEarlyBlight.name: Indwara y'Inyanya Itangira Kare
tomatoEarlyBlight.treatment: Kura amababi yanduye kandi ukoreshe umuti w'ibyonyi ukozwe muri kuparu buri cyumweru.

maizeStreakVirus.name: Virusi y'Imirongo y'Ibigori
maizeStreakVirus.symptoms: Imirongo y'umuhondo ku mitsi y'amababi n'ubukure budakwiye.
maizeStreakVirus.prevention: Koresha ubwoko budwara ku ndwara kandi ugenzure udukoko dutwara virusi.

cassavaMosaic.name: Indwara ya Mozayike y'Imyumbati
cassavaMosaic.symptoms: Amababi afite ibara ry'umuhondo n'icyatsi bivanze, asaze.
cassavaMosaic.prevention: Tera ibikamba bidafite virusi kandi ukure ibihingwa byanduye hakiri kare.

bananaBacterialWilt.name: Indwara ya Bagiteri y'Ibitoki
bananaBacterialWilt.symptoms: Amababi ahindukira umuhondo akuma, imbuto zikera hakiri kare.
bananaBacterialWilt.prevention: Disenfekta ibikoresho hagati y'ibihingwa kandi ukure ibikonde byanduye.

coffeeBerryDisease.name: Indwara y'Imbuto z'Ikawa
coffeeBerryDisease.symptoms: Ibara ryijimye ku mbuto, imbuto zigwa hakiri kare.
coffeeBerryDisease.prevention: Senda kugira ngo umwuka unyure neza kandi ukoreshe umuti wa kuparu mu gihe cy'ubuko.

riceBlast.name: Indwara y'Umuceri
riceBlast.symptoms: Ibimenyetso bisa n'agasare ku mababi hagati hafite ibara ryera-imvi.
riceBlast.prevention: Koresha ubwoko budwara ku ndwara kandi wirinde gukoresha ifumbire ya azote nyinshi.

weather.pageSubtitle: Iteganyagihe rigenewe agace n'amatangazo y'ubuhinzi ku gace wabarizwamo
weather.noHourlyData: Amakuru y'iteganyagihe rya saa saa ntahari.
weather.annualRainfallDescription: Imvura ya buri kwezi igereranyije n'impuzandengo y'amateka

market.pageSubtitle: Ibiciro by'ibicuruzwa byo mu gihe nyacyo no guhuza n'abaguzi bemejwe

peakSellingSeason.title: Igihembwe Cyiza cyo Kugurisha
peakSellingSeason.description: Ibiciro by'ibigori n'ibishyimbo akenshi bizamuka 15-20% hagati ya Kamena na Kanama.

bestMarkets.title: Amasoko Meza Ari Hafi
bestMarkets.description: Amasoko ya Kigali na Rwamagana ubu atanga ibiciro byiza ku bihingwa byawe.

exportOpportunity.title: Amahirwe yo Kohereza Ibicuruzwa mu Mahanga
exportOpportunity.description: Abatumiza ikawa n'icyayi mu mahanga barimo gushakisha abatanga ibicuruzwa bashya muri iki gihembwe.

training.pageSubtitle: Wige uburyo bwiza bw'ubuhinzi ukoresheje amavidewo n'amasomo mu ndimi z'aho uherereye

modernMaizeFarming.title: Uburyo Bugezweho bwo Guhinga Ibigori
modernMaizeFarming.description: Wige uburyo bugezweho bwo kongera umusaruro w'ibigori, kuva mu gutera kugeza mu gusarura.

integratedPestManagement.title: Imicungire Yunze Ubumwe y'Udukoko
integratedPestManagement.description: Menya kandi ucunge udukoko dukunze kugaragara ukoresheje uburyo bwizewe, bukora neza kandi burambye.

waterManagement.title: Imicungire y'Amazi ku Mirima
waterManagement.description: Uburyo bwiza bwo kuhira kugira ngo ukungahaze amazi kandi wongere umusaruro.

postHarvestHandling.title: Imicungire Nyuma yo Gusarura
postHarvestHandling.description: Uburyo bwiza bwo kubika no gucunga ibihingwa nyuma yo gusarura kugira ngo wirinde igihombo.

organicFarmingPractices.description: Hindukirira uburyo bw'ubuhinzi karemano bunoza ubuzima bw'ubutaka n'ubwiza bw'umusaruro.

farmBusinessManagement.description: Cunga umurima wawe nk'ubucuruzi — kubara amafaranga, kubika inyandiko, no gutegura iterambere.
